games.explanation: The market has WSN as a +244 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Jake Irvin keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Tyler Glasnow. LAD is the better team on paper — but the matchup favors WSN today.
MIN is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Mick Abel toes the rubber against Steven Matz. Cold temps suppress the bats.
CLE is getting plus-money at +119 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Slade Cecconi keeps CLE competitive on the mound against Shota Imanaga. Wind blowing in — pitchers' day.

picks.explanation: CWS is getting +1.5 at -110. The sim gives them a 59% chance of covering — 7.5% edge. Run line bets are higher variance, but the model sees value here.
